# Aipex Issue Template

## Summary

Describe the task, stage, bug, feature or review item.

## Project

`<project-name>`

## Pipeline stage

`Stage <number> — <name>`

## Artefact

`projects/<project-slug>/docs/<artefact>.md`

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Clear outcome defined
- [ ] Relevant artefact updated
- [ ] Security impact considered
- [ ] Testing impact considered
- [ ] Documentation impact considered
- [ ] Next action clear

## Notes

Add context, links, screenshots or references.
